pageContext.name: Evil-Lyn
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Evil-Lyn! Based on the original references from Masters of the Universe, this polystone Masters of the Universe statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   MOTU fans, don't miss your chance to add this Evil-Lyn figure to your Masters of the Universe collection!
